title: Autoclicker
description: An autoclicker mod for personal use.
body:
# Autoclicker Mod

![Autoclicker banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/005b706e22a307558157981b7bc59d48e4c868b3.png)

A powerful yet lightweight Fabric mod that lets you automate clicks with full profile management, keybind support, and a clean in-game UI — available in 🇬🇧 English, 🇪🇸 Español and 🇫🇷 Français.

---

## Features

- **Auto-clicking** — left or right click with configurable delay (ms)
- **Double-click mode** — send two clicks per tick for ultra-fast actions
- **Multi-profile system** — up to 10 named profiles (Default, Farming, Mining…)
- **Keybinds** — toggle, cycle profiles, and open the config screen without leaving the game
- **HUD overlay** — shows the active profile name while the autoclicker is running
- **Built-in translations** — English, Spanish and French included
- **ModMenu integration** — access the config screen directly from the mods list

---

## Profile System

Each profile stores its own **name** (up to 24 characters), **click delay** in milliseconds, **mouse button** (left or right), and **double-click** toggle. Create, duplicate, and delete profiles from the in-game config screen. All settings are saved automatically to `.minecraft/config/autoclicker.json`.

---

## Default Keybinds

| Action | Default Key |
|--------|-------------|
| Toggle autoclicker | `V` |
| Next profile | `N` |
| Previous profile | `M` |
| Open config screen | *(unbound)* |

All keybinds can be rebound in **Options → Controls → AutoClicker**.

---

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) for your Minecraft version.
2. Add [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to your `mods/` folder.
3. *(Optional)* Install [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for GUI config access.
4. Download the `.jar` for your version and drop it in `mods/`.
5. Launch Minecraft. Done ✅

**Required dependencies:** Fabric API · Cloth Config *(bundled)*

---

## Supported Versions

| Minecraft | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| 1.20.1 | ✅ |
| 1.20.4 | ✅ |
| 1.21.1 – 1.21.10 | ✅ |

---

## Disclaimer

This mod is intended for **single-player** use or on servers that explicitly allow automation mods. Use responsibly — the author is not responsible for bans or consequences arising from use on servers where such mods are prohibited.
